skill.name: social-media-calendar
skill.description: Plan a 30-day social media content calendar from a topic, with platform adaptations and posting time suggestions.
skill.summary: Creates structured 30-day social media calendars for campaign planning.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: The static weak cryptography alert at SKILL.md:4 is a false positive from descriptive text, not code. The entropy alert at SKILL.md:1 is also a false positive, likely caused by non-ASCII content and metadata. No evidence found of prompt injection, data exfiltration, executable commands, network access, or filesystem access.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: SKILL.md:4 contains a natural language Chinese description of content calendar planning. No cryptographic algorithm, encryption code, or credential handling is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is descriptive metadata only. There is no code path or crypto usage to exploit.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: High File Entropy
low_findings.description: SKILL.md is a 34-line Markdown file with frontmatter and Chinese text. No binary, encrypted payload, encoded blob, or obfuscated instruction was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review found readable Markdown content throughout the file. The entropy signal is consistent with multilingual text, not hidden executable content.

content.value_statement: Social teams often lose time turning campaign ideas into consistent daily posts. This skill turns one topic into a 30-day calendar with platform adaptations and timing suggestions.
actual_capabilities: Creates a 30-day content plan from a campaign topic.
Adapts post ideas for different social platforms.
Suggests publishing times for planned posts.
Supports content planning for individuals, freelancers, small businesses, and teams.
Frames output as AI-assisted work that should be reviewed by humans.
limitations: Does not publish posts or connect to social media accounts.
Does not include analytics or live audience performance data.
Requires the user to provide campaign goals and audience context.
Important brand, legal, and factual claims still need review.

use_cases.title: Launch a Small Business Campaign
use_cases.description: Build a month of post ideas for a new product, local service, or seasonal promotion.

use_cases.title: Plan Client Content Faster
use_cases.description: Convert a client brief into a structured calendar for review and revision.

use_cases.title: Coordinate Team Publishing
use_cases.description: Give a team a shared calendar with themes, platform notes, and suggested timing.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Topic Calendar
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-day social media calendar for [topic]. Include daily themes, platform suggestions, and recommended posting times.

prompt_templates.title: Audience-Focused Calendar
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-day calendar for [topic]. Audience: [audience]. Goal: [goal]. Adapt ideas for [platforms].

prompt_templates.title: Campaign Launch Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Plan 30 days of social posts for a [product or offer] launch. Include awareness, education, proof, and conversion phases.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Platform Editorial System
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a 30-day multi-platform content calendar for [brand]. Include content pillars, platform adaptations, timing, and review notes.

output_examples.input: Topic: sustainable home cleaning for a small business.
output_examples.output: A 30-day calendar with education posts, product tips, customer proof, seasonal reminders, platform notes, and suggested posting windows.

output_examples.input: Campaign: freelance design services for startups.
output_examples.output: A month of posts covering portfolio proof, founder pain points, process education, service offers, and channel-specific messaging.

output_examples.input: Brand: local fitness studio promoting a summer challenge.
output_examples.output: A structured calendar with motivation posts, class highlights, member stories, signup reminders, and timing suggestions.

best_practices: Provide the audience, offer, platforms, and campaign goal before asking for the calendar.
Review all factual claims, dates, pricing, and compliance-sensitive language before publishing.
Reuse strong posts across platforms with clear adaptations instead of copying the same text everywhere.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a calendar without defining the target audience or goal.
Do not publish AI-generated posts without brand and factual review.
Do not treat suggested posting times as guaranteed performance predictions.

faq.question: Does this skill publish posts automatically?
faq.answer: No. It plans content only. You must publish posts through your chosen social media tools.

faq.question: Can it create calendars for several platforms?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is designed to adapt content ideas for different platforms when you specify them.

faq.question: What input should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide the topic, audience, platforms, campaign goal, offer details, and any required brand rules.

faq.question: Does it use live social media analytics?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides planning suggestions and does not analyze live account performance.

faq.question: Is the output ready to publish?
faq.answer: It should be reviewed first. Check tone, factual claims, compliance needs, and brand fit.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
